name: Customer Health Score (No CS Platform)
description: Gainsight-style health scores without paying $50k/yr. Pull from Mixpanel + Zendesk + NPS tool, weight them, store in Google Sheets, Slack-alert on drops.
longDescription: For mid-market CS teams who want a real health score but can't justify Gainsight or ChurnZero pricing. Runs daily: pulls product usage from Mixpanel, support ticket volume + escalation rate from Zendesk, latest NPS score per account, and current MRR from Stripe. Computes a weighted 0-100 health score per account, writes the row to a Google Sheets dashboard, and posts a Slack alert when any account's score drops more than 15 points week-over-week. The full health monitoring system, built for $0/month beyond the API costs you already have.
